summary: Design phase complete. Gap analysis of 15 screens performed via codebase inspection (Pencil MCP unavailable — desktop app not running). 5 HTML mockup files produced covering all 15 screens across 5 PR modules. Auth frames gate established (8 frames to create in rideglory.pen before US-1-3). Donut chart scoped to color-only for iter-1. Component hierarchy, full UI copy, error messages, and accessibility documented. Two new design-system primitives specified: AppEventBadge (atom) and DocumentSlotPill (molecule).

artifacts.description: Full design handoff with all required sections
Shared CSS design tokens matching Flutter AppColors
Events list + detail + CTA variants + filter + create form (9 screens/states)
Garage list + vehicle detail + add/edit form + DocumentSlotPill states (6 screens)
Maintenance dashboard + history + form steps + filters + registration list + detail (9 screens)
Checkpoint updated — design done, next = backend
Design skill updated with iter-1 learnings

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.detail: design.md, styles.css, splash-auth.html, home.html, events.html, garage.html, maintenance-registration.html all produced

qualityGates.name: design_coverage_complete
qualityGates.detail: All 15 screens documented with loading/data/empty/error states. Auth frames gate explicit. New primitives AppEventBadge and DocumentSlotPill specified.

qualityGates.name: gap_analysis_complete
qualityGates.detail: All 5 PR modules have gap analysis tables. 15 specific color literal violations identified. TextFormField (1 file) and ElevatedButton (1 file) violations documented. Donut chart scope decision recorded (color-only).

qualityGates.name: ui_copy_complete
qualityGates.detail: All user-visible strings documented with ARB key names for all 5 modules. Error messages mapped to API error codes.

qualityGates.name: auth_frames_gate
qualityGates.detail: 8 auth frames identified as missing from rideglory.pen inventory. Gate is explicit: must be created before T-1-3. US-1-4 through US-1-10 not blocked.
